records.ety: [L. deterrere; de + terrere to frighten, terrify. See Terror.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Deterred (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Deterring.]

defs: To prevent by fear; hence, to hinder or prevent from action by fear of consequences, or difficulty, risk, etc.
quotes: Potent enemies tempt and deter us from our duty.
My own face deters me from my glass.
